hero.title: Interactive learning built for real competence
hero.description: A serious learning platform that helps teachers design better experiences and helps learners build usable skills.

gameStudio.title: Build learning worlds that truly reach your students — without writing code.
gameStudio.description: Move beyond passive lecture-heavy teaching. With WQ Game Studio, you become the architect of interactive learning experiences. Use the no-code editor to build clinical scenarios where learners develop skill through action. Endogenous game mechanics and research-based MDA models turn knowledge into real intuition. Set the standard in your institution and help students grow through immediate visual feedback.

scenarioEditor.title: No-Code Scenario Editor
scenarioEditor.description: Build complex learning worlds as easily as creating a presentation. The drag-and-drop interface lets you create interactive simulations without writing a single line of code.

didactics.title: Didactic Integration (MDA & DPE)
didactics.description: Apply research-backed models directly inside the design process. Connect learning goals with mechanics so true learning-through-action becomes part of every scenario.

feedback.title: Endogenous Feedback System
feedback.description: Turn passive knowledge into intuition. Learners receive immediate visual feedback for each decision, so practical competence develops safely through repeated interaction.

analytics.title: Competency-Based Analytics
analytics.description: Track more than grades. Follow how decision-making and problem-solving skills evolve through deeper learning data and more meaningful teaching signals.
